{{Infobox concept
| name = The Way
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[The Way Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Way]], also known as the [[Way Between Worlds]], is a fundamental force of pure order that governs existence and maintains stability across all [[Iterations]]. Often described as a branching network, a vine, or a system of veins stretching from a central heart, it provides protection against the chaos of the [[void]]. At its nexus lies [[Oversight]], where natural laws are enforced. The [[Way]] serves as a medium for travel, appearing to those who enter it as textured blue tunnels or sapphire passages that connect different worlds. While some view it as a source of power for [[sacred artists]], others see it as a system that can be manipulated or even severed, which leads to instability and chaos. Sentient beings act as ties to the [[Way]], anchoring their worlds; when these connections are lost, a world can drift away from its proper flow of time. Certain individuals, known as [[Waybound]], possess significant potential to impact the cosmos through their connection to this force. The [[Abidan]] serve as guardians of the [[Way]], though some perceive them merely as jailers.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Way]] tries to force order out of the chaos of colliding worlds.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Suriel]] can access the [[Way]] to draw flows of pure order.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Way]] governs the proper flow of time.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Way]] is often likened to a tree or a branching vine.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Suriel]] thinks of the [[Way]] as a network of veins stretching from a central heart.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[The Way]] provides order, stability, and protection from the [[void]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Way]] shone through once the barrier lifted.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[The Way]] does not make a [[Judge]] strong.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Northstrider]] stepped through the [[Way]] to reach the [[Ninecloud Court]] audience chamber.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Way]] is a place that can be entered.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Monarchs]] can track others when they step through the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Northstrider]] flows into the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Way]] is a space between worlds that looks like a tunnel of textured blue.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Mad King]] created something that hid him from the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Way]] was trembling.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Way]] is a location that can be traveled through.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Way]] is a force that can knit planets back together.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Way]] is described as an endless blue ribbon behind the darkness of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c12">''Dreadgod'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Way]] is a dimension that can be accessed through the use of portals and serves as a location where [[Ozriel]]'s authority spills over. During their journey, [[Ziel]] cautioned [[Yerin]] that she was effectively casting herself into this realm. Before [[Lindon]]'s planned ascension, it became necessary to re-establish control over the dimension. Ultimately, [[Lindon]] and [[Fury]] prepared to enter the [[Way]], though it felt distant during this particular iteration.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] is a location that [[Ozriel]]'s authority spills into.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]] warned [[Yerin]] that she was casting herself into the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13">''Waybound'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] is a dimension that can be accessed via portals.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c24">''Waybound'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Control over the [[Way]] needs to be re-established before [[Lindon]] ascends.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c31">''Waybound'', chapter 31</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] is a place [[Lindon]] and [[Fury]] prepare to enter.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Way]] feels distant in this iteration.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c38">''Waybound'', chapter 38</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|One of the fundamental properties of the [[Way]] is that it sustains coherent existence.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]] is a concept related to stable reality and connections between worlds.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Way]] is a method of travel used to reach the [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“That’s not going to lead where it came in,” he said urgently. “You’re casting yourself into the Way.”<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c13" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
